allowed_work: read the P5 arrays and metadata
produce the tracked P0-1 JSON and Markdown audit
run fixture tests and a read-only dry-run
prohibited_work: modify model code or model configuration
start training, evaluation, or data generation
write to data/, output/, checkpoints/, or logs/
modify P5 arrays, labels, metadata, or split membership

audit_contract.control_volume_weights: derive rectilinear control-volume weights from coords.npy and compare their sum to sample_meta.q_power_audit.control_volume_weight_sum_m3
audit_contract.effective_source_power: sum(q_field * control_volume_weight) and compare it to q_integral_from_array_W and q_total_target_power_W
physics_scale_proxies: series resistance and source-power DeltaT proxies
q_bc_linear_relations: target CV mean versus effective source power
target CV mean versus top-Robin DeltaT proxy
two-predictor least-squares relation using source power and top-Robin DeltaT proxy
duplicate_leakage: all sample IDs are assigned exactly once
audit_contract.interpretation_limit: The linear statistics are descriptive across heterogeneous samples; they do not claim a causal response law or model performance.
